response.justification: This candidate is a fundamental mismatch for the role. While they demonstrate strong software craftsmanship principles and teaching ability, they lack the core technical requirements: their C++ experience is outdated (10+ years ago, ~1 year duration) and shallow, there is zero Windows platform development experience (mandatory), and SQL expertise is limited to MySQL rather than SQL Server/Oracle. Additionally, their professional focus has been modern web and systems development rather than capital markets or investment banking, with only minimal incidental exposure to investment practices in a web context.
strengths: Strong communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through multiple workshops and courses
Extensive experience with software craftsmanship principles including TDD, CI/CD, and code quality
Proven ability to learn diverse technology stacks and contribute across full-stack environments
concerns: C++ experience is 10+ years old with minimal professional depth; resume shows only ~1 year of C++ work on NI LabWindows
Zero mention of Windows platform development despite being a mandatory requirement; all infrastructure is Linux/Docker-based
No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain expertise; financial exposure limited to general investment practices

key_factors.factor: Missing mandatory C++ depth on current projects
Lack of capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge
